name: analysis-flow-basic
description: New issue gets analyzed and the analysis is shared for review before posting
expected_behavior: Checks that gh, jq, and auth are set up before doing anything
Fetches the issue details including comments
Checks the issue's status from the project board, not labels
Recognizes this is a new issue and starts analyzing it
Looks around the codebase to understand what's relevant
Shows the draft analysis to the user before posting anything
Analysis covers: what's wrong, options considered, recommendation, and open questions
Waits for the user to approve before posting
Posts the analysis as a comment on the issue
Sets project fields like task type, size, and estimate
Moves the status to In Analysis
Stops here and waits — does not jump into coding
